zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas de la Mare於1420年5月出生在英國波克夏阿爾德馬斯頓時，他的父親Thomas De la Mare25歲，母親Avice Penrys Penres13歲。他於1445年與Lady Elizabeth Fynderne在英國英格蘭波克夏阿爾德馬斯頓 考特結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1492年9月2日在他的家鄉享年72歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas de la Mare于1420年5月出生在英国波克夏阿爾德馬斯頓时，他的父亲Thomas De la Mare25岁，母亲Avice Penrys Penres13岁。他于1445年与Lady Elizabeth Fynderne在英国英格兰波克夏阿爾德馬斯頓 考特结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1492年9月2日在他的家乡享年72岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: la
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Cuong, Anh, Thanh, Ha, Hoang, Tuan, Chau, Hao, Hien, Hoa, Hue, Nam, Phong, Sinh, Tuong, Min, Tam, Tanh, Thai, Tham, Tinh, Yeong.  Chinese Hong, Hang, Sang, Tong, Chan, Chi, Hwa Ja, Hyung, Kam, Ki Bong, Kin, Man.
Vietnamese: from the Chinese surname 羅, see   Luo   1.
Vietnamese (Lã): from the Chinese surname 呂, see Lu 6 and 3 below.

variants.name: Luo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Jian, Yi, Ping, Yong, Zhen, Feng, Hong, Ming, Jin, Bin, Chen, Hai, Lan, Min, Huan, Hung, Shen, Tian.
Chinese:

Mandarin form of the surname 羅, meaning ‘net for catching birds’ or ‘to collect’ in Chinese: (i) from Luo (羅), the name of an ancient state (located in present-day Hubei province). After it was annexed by the state of Chu during the early Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), people from the state migrated southwards and adopted Luo (羅) as their surname. (ii) from the Po Duo Luo (破多羅) and Chi Luo (叱羅) families from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China, who changed their original surnames to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) from the personal name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅), leader of an ancient Turkic tribe who are believed to have migrated to China during the Tang dynasty (618–907  AD ). His descendants inherited his name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅) as their surname and shortened it to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iv) from the name of one of the seven families from the Bandun Man, an ethnic group residing in ancient southwestern China (located mainly in present-day Sichuan province).

nameMeanings.name: Mare
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Americo, Cesareo, Fernando, Ines, Javier, Jose, Marcos.  Portuguese Henrique.  Italian Antonio, Gino, Olindo, Silvio, Vito.  Dutch Andries.
Italian: topographic name for someone living by the sea, from mare ‘sea’.
English: variant of   Mear  .

variants.name: Marucci
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Rocco, Antonio, Silvio, Angelo, Carmela, Domenic, Donato, Egidio, Guido, Licinio, Lorenzo, Luciano.
Italian: patronymic or plural form of the personal name Maruccio, a pet form of Mare or Mari .

variants.name: Marelli
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Rocco, Giuseppe, Angelo, Dante.
Italian:
patronymic or plural form of a diminutive of   Mare  .

variants.name: Mear
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Otto, Hans, Franz, Helmut, Wilhelm, Erwin, Gerhard, Heinz, Ilse, Lorenz, Wolfgang.

English (Staffordshire): post-medieval form of Mear, which is either a topographic name, from Middle English mere ‘pond, pool’ (Old English mere) or Middle English mere ‘boundary’ (Old English (ge)mǣre), or a habitational name from one or more of the many places with names derived from these terms, such as Mere (Cheshire, Lincolnshire, Wiltshire), Meir in Caverswall (Staffordshire), and Meare (Somerset).
English: occupational name for a physician, from Old French mire, Middle English mire, meir, meyre, originally synonymous with Myer .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas de la Mare was born in May 1420, in Aldermaston, Berkshire, England, his father, Thomas De la Mare, was 25 and his mother, Avice Penrys Penres, was 13. He married Lady Elizabeth Fynderne in 1445, in Aldermaston Court, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 2 September 1492, in his hometown, at the age of 72.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas de la Mare est né en mai 1420, à Aldermaston, Berkshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas De la Mare, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Avice Penrys Penres, avait 13 ans. Il a épousé Lady Elizabeth Fynderne en 1445, à Aldermaston Court, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 2 septembre 1492, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 72 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas de la Mareが1420年5月にイギリスバークシュアイアアルデルマストンで生まれた時，父Thomas De la Mareは25歳，母Avice Penrys Penresは13歳であった。1445年にイギリスイギリスバークシュアイアアルデルマストン コウルトでLady Elizabeth Fynderneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1492年9月2日に故郷で72歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas de la Mare(이)가 1420년 5월 영국 버크실르 알더마스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas De la Mare(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Avice Penrys Penres(은)는 13세였다. 그는 1445년 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 알더마스턴 쿠르트에서 Lady Elizabeth Fynderne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1492년 9월 2일 그의 고향에서 72세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas de la Mare родился май 1420 г. в местности алдирмастон, биркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas De la Mare было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Avice Penrys Penres, 13. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Elizabeth Fynderne в 1445 г. в местности алдирмастон коурт, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 2 сентября 1492 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 72 лет.
